title: erigeron hyrcanicus
intro: Erigeron hyrcanicus, also known as Dagestan fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Erigeron hyrcanicus include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Erigeron hyrcanicus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's leaves and flowers.
